title: Prepare and paint plastic and composite vehicle surfaces
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and paint plastic and composite vehicle surfaces demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to paint plastic and composite components

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Paint information is accessed and interpreted1.3 Plastic paint materials are selected and inspected for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Paint tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) are identified and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify preparation and painting methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Paint information is accessed and interpreted1.3 Plastic paint materials are selected and inspected for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Paint tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) are identified and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify preparation and painting methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Paint information is accessed and interpreted1.3 Plastic paint materials are selected and inspected for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Paint tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) are identified and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify preparation and painting methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to paint plastic and composite components

elements.title: Clean plastic or composite surface

pcs.text: Surface is prepared for refinishing according to paint manufacturer technical specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Surface is checked to ensure it is free of oil, dust and other contaminants2.3 Surface preparation is completed without causing damage to vehicle, other components and systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Surface is prepared for refinishing according to paint manufacturer technical specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Surface is checked to ensure it is free of oil, dust and other contaminants2.3 Surface preparation is completed without causing damage to vehicle, other components and systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Surface is prepared for refinishing according to paint manufacturer technical specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Surface is checked to ensure it is free of oil, dust and other contaminants2.3 Surface preparation is completed without causing damage to vehicle, other components and systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Clean plastic or composite surface

elements.title: Apply refinishing material

pcs.text: Plastic or composite refinishing material is applied according to paint manufacturer approved methods3.2 Refinishing material is dried using approved methods and equipment3.3 Painted area is polished and finished using approved techniques and equipment3.4 Paint finish is checked against specifications3.5 Refinishing is completed without causing damage to surrounding painted areas and components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plastic or composite refinishing material is applied according to paint manufacturer approved methods3.2 Refinishing material is dried using approved methods and equipment3.3 Painted area is polished and finished using approved techniques and equipment3.4 Paint finish is checked against specifications3.5 Refinishing is completed without causing damage to surrounding painted areas and components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plastic or composite refinishing material is applied according to paint manufacturer approved methods3.2 Refinishing material is dried using approved methods and equipment3.3 Painted area is polished and finished using approved techniques and equipment3.4 Paint finish is checked against specifications3.5 Refinishing is completed without causing damage to surrounding painted areas and components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply refinishing material

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and component is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and component is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
